summary: The diff implements a TAB_TITLES mapping in TimerVisibilityBar.tsx that dynamically sets the dialog title and description based on the active tab. The 'share' tab maps to title 'Share' and description 'Share your timer setup', while other tabs (background, music, alerts, timer-tabs) map to 'Settings'. An activeTab state variable is tracked and used to look up the appropriate title/description. This directly addresses REQ-1.
